title: Payment of Fees. Upon approval of the application, the applicant shall:
content: 14 15 a. Pay a license fee of One Hundred Thousand Pesos (PhP100,000.00); and 16 17 b. Submit an Escrow Deposit Agreement with a commercial bank authorized to 18 handle trust accounts by the BSP, supported by a bank certification stating the 19 deposit of an amount not less than that required by the applicable BSP Rules 20 and Regulations, but in no case should it be less than Seven Hundred Fifty 21 Thousand Pesos (PhP 750,000.00). 22 23
